objective: Research and validate IBS (Internal Bar Strength) mean reversion on SPY — identify optimal entry threshold, holding period, trend/sizing filters, and compare all strategy variants to determine the best risk-adjusted approach.
criteria: Identify the IBS formula, interpretation, and how mean reversion edge works
Run and compare all existing IBS strategy variants (ibs_spy, ibs_trend, ibs_dynamic, volume_scaled_ibs)
Compare IBS performance against other mean reversion strategies (RSI2, %B, down streak, ToM)
Test on QQQ to check cross-asset robustness
Evaluate the mr_portfolio which combines IBS with other signals
Determine optimal IBS threshold and holding period
Assess drawdown, Sharpe, win rate trade-offs across variants
Record final verdict: which IBS approach is best for which trading style
